prompt: create a dying versions for the Metastatic Melanoma Cells found in the image
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to depict the Metastatic Melanoma Cells in a dying state. Show clear visual signs of cell death, such as cell shrinkage, membrane blebbing (forming irregular protrusions), nuclear condensation or fragmentation (changes to the blue central regions), and a general breakdown or disorganization of the cytoplasm (the green speckles and red/yellow outer membranes appearing less defined or fragmented). The overall image should maintain a photorealistic microscopic appearance, conveying cells undergoing processes like apoptosis or necrosis.
